parameters.content:
## SETUP INSTRUCTIONS

This version delegates lead processing to a separate sub-workflow (see 02-lead-enrichment-routing.json in this same folder). Both must be imported for this to function.

1. Import the sub-workflow FIRST, note its new workflow ID.
2. In the "Call Lead Enrichment & Routing" node here, set workflowId to that ID.
3. Webhook node — create a `httpHeaderAuth` credential and configure your form's fetch() to send the matching header.
4. Google Sheets nodes — replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID` with your own.
5. Set this workflow's Error Workflow (Settings) to your error-handler workflow.

nodes.name: Validate & Standardize
nodes.notes: Unchanged from prior version — fallback defaults, IST conversion with try/catch, phone/email regex validation.

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Requires a custom header 'royalfit-rfu' or your own shared-secret header name — confirm the header name matches what your website form sends.

nodes.name: Call Lead Enrichment & Routing
nodes.notes: ARCHITECTURE CHANGE (v3): Google Sheets/Airtable/Telegram writes moved out of this workflow entirely and into a dedicated sub-workflow, which now also handles returning-vs-new-lead detection, CRM update-or-create logic, email verification, and personalized email replies. This workflow's job is now purely: receive, authenticate, validate, dedup. workflowId must be set to your imported sub-workflow's ID after import — n8n does not preserve cross-workflow references automatically.
